title: cog Tag-Only Release Flow Implementation Plan
summary: An implementation plan (now superseded by ADR fhsk-dgo) for replacing release-please with cocogitto tag-only releases.
notes: Marked SUPERSEDED in frontmatter caution block (line 4). Explicitly deprecated in favor of ADR fhsk-dgo (Accepted 2026-06-09). Retained for historical context only. Document is a runbook/implementation plan with step-by-step tasks and verification commands, not a requirement or architectural decision.
